title: T-030 — API: D365 connection test + feature flag gate
prompt:
# T-030 — API: D365 connection test + feature flag gate

PRD: docs/prd/03-TECHNICAL-PRD.md §13.6, §13.10
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Connection test endpoint + feature-flag gate utility for all D365 endpoints.

Permission gate: technical.d365.sync.trigger or 'owner' role. Returns sanitized info — no secrets in payload. assertD365Enabled used as guard.

## Implementation contract
See `## Goal` + scope_files + acceptance_criteria below; preserve prototype parity, server-action semantics, RLS/org-scoping, and module red-lines listed in `## Risk red lines`.

## Files
- app/api/technical/d365/health/route.ts [create]
- lib/integrations/d365/gate.ts [create]
- tests/api/d365-health.test.ts [create]

## Out of scope
- Pull/push (T-028/T-029)

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given integration.d365.enabled=false, when assertD365Enabled invoked, then throws Disabled error.
2. Given any of 5 Apex constants empty, when assertD365Enabled invoked, then throws V-SET-42 error.
3. Given valid config, when GET /health called, then JSON includes connected, latency_ms, last_sync_at.

## Test strategy
- RED tests for gate + sanitized health response.
- Run: pnpm vitest run tests/api/d365-health.test.ts

## Risk red lines
- Do not return secrets in health response.
- FG is canonical; FA is legacy alias only — do not introduce FA-* identifiers in new schemas, code, labels, tests.
- D365 is optional integration; never use D365 IDs as hard FKs — d365_item_id is TEXT soft reference only.
- Released BOM/factory_spec edits clone-on-write a new version; never mutate an approved/released row in place.
- Shared BOM SSOT is canonical — Technical, NPD, Planning, Production, Warehouse and Finance read the same bom_headers/lines/co_products tables.
